title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Bizarre Hack Pt. 1
description:
This is one strange SMB3 hack that I found from the internet. No, this is not a corruption video, but it sure looks like one. 

This hack is randomly and completely disorganized, and some of the graphics contain errors. The difficulty of the levels range from medium to hard, although there are many power-ups and 1-ups to collect, making the game somewhat more chanceful. There are some parts in the game that makes you want to go "Wtf?" And lastly, the person who made this hack must have been extremely bored.

Enjoy! There will be more parts coming soon.

Watch part 2: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NF5le7MB3D8
